name: Coby Daniel
ai_summary: Former firefighter EMT with childcare experience at Premier Early Learning Academy/Cadence, CPR/first aid certified with a clean background check, seeking full-time or part-time roles in Dallas, Georgia. Their compassionate, safety-first approach and experience with after-school programs make them well-suited for creating nurturing environments for children.

transcripts.q3:
Hi. My name is Coby, Daniel, I was a firefighter EMT before I started working in childcare. I then was employed with Premier Early Learning Academy, which then was bought out and became Cadence. I then decided it was best for me to venture out because I would like to work at different centers. And with different age groups, I was the after-school program teacher for one year, along with the bus driver. I am CPR. First aid, a decertified. I've also had my FBI in
 My background check and fingerprints done. I would love to start working with up kid so that I may provide a great future in a safe and nurturing environment for our young ones.
transcripts.q4:
I am located in Dallas. Georgia. I have lived here approximately two years and before that, I lived in Carroll County.
 Which is Paulding County, Georgia.
transcripts.q5: I am looking for full-time or part-time, it doesn't matter and I'm available for any shift.
